overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rainy futuristic city with towering skyscrapers and neon signs, transitioning from dense urban streets to coastal highways. The footage features wet reflective roads, multiple overpass levels, and a gradual shift from industrial cityscape to open coastal roads with mountain backdrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban industrial street with multi-level overpasses

events.description: accelerating through wet streets beneath towering overpass structures
entering industrial zone with large storage tanks and smokestacks visible

agents.ego_description: navigating a red motorcycle through rainy urban streets beneath towering overpasses and neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with large 06 signage illuminated on the facade
massive concrete and steel highway overpass spanning the road
large spherical industrial storage tanks with metallic surfaces
illuminated advertisement with yellow and pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person motorcycle view driving through a dense, rainy cyberpunk city. The rider passes beneath massive concrete overpasses with the iconic 06 skyscraper visible ahead. Industrial tanks and smokestacks emerge on the right as the scene transitions into a more industrial zone, with wet asphalt reflecting the neon lights and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with industrial backdrop

events.description: merging onto main highway and accelerating under multiple overpass levels
overtaking a black SUV on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the highway and weaving through moderate traffic under concrete overpasses

notable_agents.action: black SUV being overtaken on the highway

entered.detail: metal guardrails lining both sides of the highway
warning signs with black and yellow chevrons indicating curves

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle accelerates onto a multi-lane highway beneath a complex network of overpasses. The environment is sheltered from rain by the concrete structures above. The rider overtakes a black SUV while navigating through moderate traffic, with industrial buildings visible in the background and yellow chevron signs marking the road curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway through urban outskirts with billboards

events.description: leaving dense industrial zone for open highway with fewer structures
maintaining high speed on long straightaway with minimal traffic

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed along the highway with minimal traffic, passing large digital billboards

entered.detail: large red sign with white arrow pointing right
tall illuminated advertisement screen showing a character portrait
elevated road structure crossing above the highway

segments.scene_description: The highway opens up into a wider, less enclosed space as the city industrial zone fades behind. The motorcycle speeds along a straight stretch with sparse traffic, passing prominent billboards including one with a large arrow and another with a digital character advertisement. Overpass structures continue to appear in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal highway with bridge structures

events.description: emerging onto coastal highway with mountain cliffs visible on the right
rain clearing and visibility improving as sky becomes visible

agents.ego_description: driving along the coastal highway with mountains visible on the right, weather beginning to clear

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: massive concrete bridge pillars and support structures
rocky mountain face with sparse vegetation emerging from the mist
concrete barrier separating the highway from the coastal drop

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions dramatically as the highway emerges onto a coastal route with massive bridge structures on the left and mountain cliffs appearing on the right. The heavy rain begins to clear, revealing a brighter sky and improving visibility. A black sedan overtakes on the left as the road stretches forward toward the coastline.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway approaching intersection with traffic control

events.description: approaching red traffic light and slowing down
traffic light turns green, accelerating through intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing through a traffic light intersection on the coastal highway

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead stopping at red light then proceeding through green

entered.detail: traffic signal mounted on overhead gantry
directional signage on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the motorcycle driving along the cleared coastal highway with mountains now clearly visible. The rider approaches a traffic light intersection, slows for the red signal, then accelerates through as it turns green. The weather has fully cleared to reveal a bright sky, and the road continues toward the distant city skyline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person motorcycle journey that transitions from a rain-slicked urban center into a sheltered industrial highway. It begins by weaving through a dense cyberpunk city under a heavy downpour, passing beneath massive concrete overpasses with the towering 06 skyscraper looming ahead. As the rider moves forward, the cityscape shifts toward an industrial zone where wet asphalt reflects neon lights and smokestacks emerge along the roadside. The scene then opens onto a multi-lane highway, where the oppressive rain gives way to the cover of a complex network of overhead concrete structures. Finally, the camera accelerates through moderate traffic, overtaking a black SUV and following yellow chevron signs as the environment expands into a wide industrial corridor.

The shot follows a continuous high-speed journey that transitions from a dense industrial highway into a bright, open coastal landscape. It begins as the motorcycle speeds away from the city's industrial zone, passing large digital billboards and overpass structures along a wide, straight stretch of road. As the highway emerges onto a coastal route, the environment shifts dramatically with massive bridge structures appearing on the left and mountain cliffs on the right, while the heavy rain begins to clear. The scene then opens further into a bright, clear sky as a black sedan overtakes the rider on the way toward the coastline. Finally, the motorcycle slows for a red light at a coastal intersection before accelerating forward toward the distant city skyline under fully cleared weather.
